topics.title: Jerry Falwell Death and Roast Preparations
topics.summary: The studio discusses the upcoming roast of Andy Dick, including reports of his publicist's resignation, while also reacting to the death of evangelist Jerry Falwell.

topics.title: Opie and Anthony Suspension
topics.summary: The studio discusses the suspension of Opie and Anthony from XM satellite radio following controversial remarks about public officials and addresses their attempts to involve Howard Stern in their situation.

topics.title: Radio Industry Dynamics and Jerry Falwell Criticism
topics.summary: The show features a discussion on the commercial nature of radio broadcasting, the lack of free speech in paid media, and a scathing critique of Jerry Falwell's public statements and legacy.

topics.title: Radio Show Commentary and Guest Interactions
topics.summary: The show features a series of segments including listener feedback on guest appearances, discussions regarding a comic book collection, and a humorous review of various musical tracks.

topics.title: Andy Dick Roast
topics.summary: The studio hosts a roast of Andy Dick, featuring guest comedians and discussions regarding his personal life and upcoming plans.

topics.title: Andy Dick Roast
topics.summary: The show features a roast of actor Andy Dick, featuring appearances by Artie Lange, Lisa Lampenelli, and various comedians.

topics.title: The Roast of Andy Dick
topics.summary: The studio hosts a comedy roast for Andy Dick featuring various comedians, including Benji Brock and David Tell, while the host delivers insults to guests like Robin Quivers and Artie Lange.

topics.title: Comedy Roast of Andy Dick
topics.summary: The studio hosts a roast featuring various comedians and guests who deliver insults directed at Andy Dick, Lisa Lampanelli, and Robin Quivers.

topics.title: Andy Dick Roast Comedy Set
topics.summary: The show features a series of comedians and roast segments centered on Andy Dick, including performances by Yucco the Clown, Bob Levy, and Lisa Lampanelli.

topics.title: Andy Dick Roast
topics.summary: The studio features a roast of Andy Dick, involving insults toward Artie Lange and other guests followed by a series of musical performances and crude jokes.

topics.title: Comedy Roast and Performance Review
topics.summary: The studio reviews the performances of various comedians during a recent roast, specifically discussing Andy Dick's appearance, the effectiveness of specific jokes, and Benji's need for better preparation.

topics.title: Don Rickles Interview
topics.summary: The studio hosts a conversation with comedian Don Rickles regarding his career, his autobiography, and his experiences working with legendary figures like Frank Sinatra.

topics.title: Don Rickles Memoir and Career Reflections
topics.summary: The studio features Don Rickles discussing his memoir, his interactions with celebrities like Frank Sinatra and David Letterman, and his long career in show business.

topics.title: Don Rickles and John Stamos Appearance
topics.summary: The studio hosts a discussion regarding the legacy of Don Rickles, the production of various reality television shows, and an interview with actor John Stamos following a comedy roast.
